text:
In the projection, $personName performed a standard military salute, "Confirmed, friend of $theFaction. How can I help?"
OR
"Identified, my friend. How have you been?"
OR
"Welcome! Dear friend. May your future be illuminated by the truth!"

"This is $theFaction's territory. We built it with our sweat and we will defend it with our blood." The projection of $heOrShe $personRank $personName makes you uneasy.
OR
 $personRank says succinctly, "Now that you've made your decision, prepare to die."
options: cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
"You are causing harm to the legitimate rights of $theFaction. Please stop your actions immediately and lower your shields, otherwise we have the right to take defensive measures."
OR
"This is $theFaction. I have requested support from friendly units. You should immediately stop attacking my unit." $personRank $personName solemnly declares to you.
OR
The chilling intention almost overflowed from the communication projection, "Never retreat, no matter the cost!"
options: cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
"Today is the day you say goodbye to the observable universe." $personName showed no signs of nervousness.
OR
"No need to say more. Warriors crave glory, and $theFaction doesn't care about your last words."
OR
"Purge the ignorance." The officer unilaterally cut off the connection without even looking at you.
options: cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text: "Identify yourself immediately! Otherwise, our patrol will enforce local regulations in accordance with the law."
options:
turnOnTransponder: Turn on the transponder
cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
"You should not hide your identity within our jurisdiction. We will safeguard the rights of $theFaction in accordance with the law."
OR
"Only those with something to hide would resort to such sneaky behavior!"
options:
turnOnTransponder: Turn on the transponder
cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
$personName opened a recording device, "Independent captain, please cooperate with our routine inspection."
OR
"Identity confirmation. Please declare your purpose of entry and cooperate with us in cargo inspection."
OR
"The Armed Fleet Temporary Pass is confirmed to be valid. To ensure that your legal rights in $theFaction-controlled space are not infringed upon, please synchronize your route information to the designated frequency."

The Red Stripe Knights, as they always do, treat your request with appropriate caution, standard hospitality, and necessary prudence. As long as you do not violate local laws and do not infringe upon the rights of the Red Stripe Knights and its subjects, you are almost unimpeded, but that's the extent of it.

You have been judged by the think tank of the Red Stripe Knights as having excellent character and cooperation value, granting you convenience in cross-border trade. It also means you have access to some non-regulated products in the Red Stripe Knights military market. Some young officers have also reduced their hostility towards you and began to regard you as a reliable member in the great cause of realizing the Sector's renaissance.

Your recognition of the values of the Red Stripe Knights has won the favor and respect of most of them. Even without a written treaty, you receive treatment similar to that of a foreign officer. Your cooperation value is recognized, and you are judged by the think tank as a friendly entity. As a friend of the Red Stripe Knights, you can obtain some controlled items that should not circulate in the Sector.

Your recognition of the values of the Red Stripe Knights has won the favor and respect of most of them. Under the written treaty, you receive treatment similar to that of a Guard Corps officer. Your cooperation value is recognized, and you are judged by the think tank as a friendly entity. As a friend of the Red Stripe Knights, you can obtain some controlled items that should not circulate in the Sector.

You are considered by the leadership of the Red Stripe Knights to be a credible entity and a trustworthy friend. Your interests will be given priority without harming the rights of the Knights. You will be eligible to use the senior military hardware currently in service in the Guard Corps, and the balance of cooperation will tilt towards your interests.

The Red Stripe Knights regard you as a loyal friend who can be entrusted with their backs. The Knights have no secrets from you. Your authority is equivalent to that of the Pope under certain circumstances. The Guard Corps can also accept your dispatch to a certain extent. You will be eligible to use the top weapons of the Knights' armed forces currently in service. But this also means that one day you and the Knights will face major threats that they cannot face alone.

The administrative agencies of the Knights protect your rights within the jurisdiction in accordance with the law, but their suspicion of you is obvious. You can feel their increasingly harsh attitude. Even though the open market is still open, you can expect that patrol fleets will pay more attention to you in the foreseeable future.

The armed forces of the Knights have listed you as a potential enemy, and the patrol fleets will track your whereabouts. The Order's administrative agencies will place you on the sanctions list, closely review every transaction, and initiate implicit restrictions. Within the jurisdiction of the Knights, you always feel watched and unsafe.

You can no longer openly enter the markets of the Red Stripe Knights. You have been included in the enemy list by the armed forces of the Red Stripe Knights, and the Guard Corps has approved an unlimited force upgrade against you. If you are identified within the jurisdiction, you will be pursued by patrol fleets until your flagship is destroyed.

You have been judged as an enemy that must be eliminated by the decision-makers of the Red Stripe Knights. The Guard Corps trains with you as the target. Erasing your presence will become the main focus of the Knights' armed forces. It seems even the Pope made a comment on your wanted order for expedited processing.

You are a great friend of the Order of the Red Stripe and a hero to its people. With your help, the Knights survived the crisis, and your name will be recorded in the history books for future generations to study.

script:
AddText "It is rare for you to see such a blessed place in today's Sector. You can feel the vitality and hope filling the air. The people here protect the land and themselves very well." marketFlavorTextColor
AddText "Administrative agency staff are verifying your market access qualifications. After completing the quick and systematic procedures, you will be allowed to trade in the open market." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "From the moment you stepped into the port, you noticed the rush of the people in this colony: they all seemed to have clear goals and were in a hurry. You temporarily put this observation behind you and started to go through the market access procedures." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "This colony built on a gas giant will leave you with a rigorous impression when it docks. It seems that the grassroots officials here are well-educated in science. You can see the huge star fortress blocking most of the star's light through the port window." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "Whether viewed from the outside or the inside, this massive fortress is undeniably a pure military center. Unlike the dual-use facilities common in other colonies of the Knights, this fortress is dedicated solely to defense and operations. The officers here always have the air of scholars." marketFlavorTextColor

text:
The Red Stripe Knights' logo flashes for a moment and then transforms into a projection of a young girl. She looks at you with clear and slightly curious eyes.
"Hello! Are you Commander $playerName? How can I help you? This famous commander~"

You see her figure in the projection greeting you with a brisk gesture:
"Hey~ Commander $playerName~, tell me what you want to do today~"
Next you want to:
options:
RS_Komet_Chat_Open: Chat
RS_KometBounty: hunting out-of-control automated units
RS_HullTrad: Customized ship purchase
RS_BPExchange_start: Exchange blueprints with ships

text:
Her joy was beyond words:
"Okay, okay~ Commander~, what are you going to talk about? As long as you can drag me out of this dark paperwork, you will be my savior!!"
options:
RS_Komet_Faction: Let’s talk about the Knights
RS_Komet_RegnumDei: Let’s talk about the Regnum Dei system
RS_Komet_Personal: Talk about herself
RS_Komet_Chat_Back: Nothing, I think I have to go back

text:
She paused while processing the paperwork and looked up at you.
"If you ask me this, even though I don't understand the big truth, I think people here live a very happy life, and I have made a lot of friends~"
options:
RS_Komet_RegnumDei: Let’s talk about the Regnum Dei system
RS_Komet_Personal: Talk about herself
RS_Komet_Chat_Back: It's okay, I think I have to go back

text:
She sits up straight, as if she wants to convey her determination to you through her body posture.
"I don't know much about politics and calculations, but I know how my life has come about so far. People here are kind to me, so I should do my best."
options:
RS_Komet_Faction: Let’s talk about the Knights
RS_Komet_Personal: Talk about herself
RS_Komet_Chat_Back: It's okay, I think I have to go back

text:
She tilted her head and seemed to be thinking about something.
"What color do you like? Of course it's red! No, no, no, it's not for a secondary reason like blood. It's just that, you see, red has a sense of speed. It flies in the sky like a red line cutting through the universe. It's very cool~"
options:
RS_Komet_Faction: Let’s talk about the Knights
RS_Komet_RegnumDei: Let’s talk about the Regnum Dei system
RS_Komet_Chat_Back: It's okay, I think I have to go back

text:
The energetic girl in the projection waves to you:
"Have a safe journey~, Commander $playerName. Remember to bring me some souvenirs~"
"I really don't know which arrogant explorer is responsible for this. Recently, their movements have become more and more frequent. I owe half of my daily workload to them >.<"
options: RSContactBounty_docket: Ask her if she needs help
RSMilitaryCustomBounty_1: Ask her for details

text: "Okay~ It would be great if Commander is willing to help~" Her excitement was palpable, but was quickly overshadowed by seriousness. "But Commander, this is quite a troublesome job. Let me explain it to you first."
options: RSMilitaryCustomBounty_2:What can I do

text: "The content is simple and straightforward. Come here and clear out a fleet of automated ships. No restrictions other than that." She sends a message to your Tripad, pointing to a remote star system, but little else.
options: RSMilitaryCustomBounty_3: Can you have specific information about this batch of unmanned fleets?

text: You can clearly observe her disappointment. "Although we don't want to admit it, we still don't know the composition of their fleet; but one thing is certain: they behave strangely and are powerful." She stuck out her tongue, showing a trace of worry. "Commander, I suggest you think carefully~"
options:
RSMilitaryCustomBounty_1_1:Accept
RSMilitaryCustomBounty_1_2:Next time
